rounds.sourceText: With off white, ch 114
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

warnings.message: Expected 114 produced stitches, but expanded to 0.

actions.note: the 2nd ch from the hook and in each ch across

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in the 2nd ch from the hook and in each ch across. (113 sc) Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 1

actions.instruction: Change to teal yarn while working the last sc

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 2

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 3

actions.instruction: changing to off white in the last sc

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 4

actions.instruction: around the next sc from 3 rows below (see reference image)
the sc behind the fpdc you just made
actions.note: sc behind the fpdc you just made

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the next sc from 3 rows below (see reference image), then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 5

actions.note: last sc; changing to light blue

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each st across, changing to light blue in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 7

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 8

actions.note: around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below
the sc behind the fpdc you just made

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 9

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across,changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 10

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 11

actions.note: last sc; changing to off white

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 12

actions.note: around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below
the sc behind the fpdc you just made

rounds.sourceText: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.sourceText: Repeat Rows 6-13 until you have a total of 118 rows.
rounds.title: Repeat Rows 6-13

actions.instruction: do one more row of sc

rounds.sourceText: Then ch 1, turn, and do one more row of sc.
rounds.title: Final Row

actions.instruction: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.

rounds.sourceText: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.
rounds.title: Weave in ends

actions.note: evenly around the entire blanket; With off white
to the first sc you made

rounds.sourceText: With off white, place one sc evenly around the entire blanket. Place 3 sc in each corner. *Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge. Join with sl st to the first sc you made.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.sourceText: Finish off white, add teal.
rounds.title: Finish off white, add teal.

actions.instruction: in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner
actions.note: each st around; placing 3 hdc in each corner

rounds.sourceText: Ch 2, 1 hdc in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first hdc. Finish off teal, add light blue.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.sourceText: Ch 1, 1 sc in each st around, place 3 sc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first sc. Finish off. Weave in ends.
rounds.title: Round 3
